name: Diagrid
description: Managed Dapr platform providing durable workflows, Catalyst (MCP/agents), and Conductor for microservices orchestration.

seo.title: Diagrid — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Diagrid: Managed Dapr platform providing durable workflows, Catalyst (MCP/agents), and Conductor for microservices orchestration.

when_to_use: Durable Dapr-based workflows for microservice orchestration
MCP and AI agent backends with Catalyst managed service
Simplifying distributed service communication with managed Dapr
Microservices with pub/sub, state, and service invocation via API
Reliable orchestration for long-running distributed workflows

pros: Catalyst targets agents and MCP cleanly
cons: Only makes sense if you adopt Dapr
review.verdict: The easiest way to run Dapr in production, with obvious dependence on Dapr as your paradigm.
review.best_for: Microservice teams betting on Dapr and durable workflow patterns
review.not_for: Teams happy with plain Kubernetes and no Dapr abstraction

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock

lock_in.reason: Based on OSS Dapr, some proprietary
